---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-06"
---

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(sf)
library(biscale)
library(janitor)
library(innovar)
library(cowplot)
library(ggmagnify)
library(magick)

source("./_functions/functions.R")
```


```{r}
wi_sae <- read.csv("./data/final_data/resultados_SAE_loreto_wi.csv")
edu_sae <- read.csv("./data/final_data/resultados_SAE_loreto_edu.csv")

data("Peru")

distritos <- Peru %>% filter(dep == "LORETO") %>% mutate(ubigeo = as.integer(ubigeo))
```

```{r}
wi_sae_fh2<- wi_sae %>% filter(modelo =="modelo_fh2_spatial_2")

edu_sae_fh2<- edu_sae %>% filter(modelo =="modelo_fh2_spatial_2")
```


```{r, warning=F, message=F}
malaria_dist_total <- read_csv("./data/aux_data/malaria_dist_total.csv") %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  filter(year %in% c(2010:2020)) %>% 
  right_join(distritos) %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
  mutate(
    malaria_incidence = ifelse(is.na(malaria_incidence),0,malaria_incidence)
  )

malaria_dist_specie <- read_csv("data/aux_data/malaria_dist_species.csv") %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  right_join(distritos) %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
    mutate(
    malaria_incidence = ifelse(is.na(malaria_incidence),0,malaria_incidence)
  )

```

# MALARIA -----

```{r}

df_final<- read.csv("./data/aux_data/fig1_data.csv")

pre_fig1<-
  df_final %>% 
  #filter(year %in%c(2016:2020)) %>% 
  mutate(
    lowic = estimate - (1.96*se),
    uppwic = estimate + (1.96*se),
    ubigeo = as.character(ubigeo)
  ) %>% 
  
  ggplot(aes(y = estimate, x = ubigeo)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lowic, ymax = uppwic, col = as.factor(index)), 
                  linewidth = .5, alpha = .4) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("edu" = "red4",
                                "wi" = "blue4"),
                     
                     labels = c("edu" = "Elementary education",
                                "wi"  = "Poverty status")) +
  
  labs(
    col = NULL,
    x = "Ubigeo",
    y = "Direct estimates"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    #legend.position = c(0.82,0.1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x  = element_blank()
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 6) +
  
  coord_flip()
```


```{r}
loreto_malaria_area<-
  malaria_dist_total %>% 
  group_by(year,prov) %>% 
  summarise(meanincidence = mean(malaria_incidence)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = meanincidence, fill = prov)) +
  
  geom_area(alpha=0.5 , size=.5) +
  ggsci::scale_fill_nejm() +
  
  labs(fill = "Provinces\n(admin level-2)",
       y = "malaria incidence x 1000 inhab.",
       x = "year") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2010,2020), breaks = seq(2010,2020,2)) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major  = element_blank()
  )

legend_prov <- gtable::gtable_add_padding(
  get_legend2(loreto_malaria_area),
  padding = unit(c(1, 0, 0, 1), "cm")  # top, right, bottom, left
)

loreto_malaria_area_nolegend<-loreto_malaria_area + theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
peru_prov<-
malaria_dist_total %>%
  filter(year == 2010) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = prov),alpha = .5) +
  ggsci::scale_fill_nejm() +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme_void() 


peru_dist <- Peru
peru_mini <- 
peru_dist %>%
  mutate(
    loreto_col = ifelse(dep.code == "16","1","0")
  ) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  
  geom_sf(data = peru_dist %>%
            st_union() %>%
            st_as_sf(), 
          
          fill = NA, 
          color = "black", 
          size = 1) +
  
  geom_sf(aes(fill = loreto_col, col = loreto_col)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("1" = "grey50",
                                "0" = "grey90")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1" = "grey50",
                                "0" = "grey90")) +
  guides(fill = "none", col = "none") +
  theme_void()

######
logo <- image_read("./flecha-curva.png")

peru_loreto<-
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(peru_prov) +
  draw_plot(peru_mini, 
            x = 0.08, y = 0.15, 
            width = 0.20, height = 0.30) +
  draw_image(logo, 
             x = 0.18, y = 0.45, 
             width = 0.1, height = 0.1)
```

```{r}
malaria_prov_map<-
  plot_grid(
plot_grid(peru_loreto,loreto_malaria_area_nolegend,
          rel_widths = c(1.1,.9)),

legend_prov, nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(1,.1))
```

```{r}
malaria_maps<-
  malaria_dist_total %>% 
  filter(year%in%c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = log10(malaria_incidence))) +
  
  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 1) +
  theme_void() +
scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")), # rojo alto, azul bajo
    #limits = c(-1.5, 4),        # según tus valores
    #values = scales::rescale(c(-1.5, 0, 4)), # 0 al centro
    oob = scales::squish,
    na.value = "gray80",
    name = "log10(Malaria incidence x 1000 inhab.)"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_colourbar(barheight = .5, 
                                barwidth = 14,
                                title.position = "top",
                                direction = "horizontal")) +
  
  theme(
    #legend.position = c(.45,.15),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 0, 0, 0), "cm")
  )

#ggsave("./figures/test2.png", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 10)
```

```{r}
plot_grid(pre_fig1,
          
          malaria_prov_map,
          
          ggplot() + theme_void() ,
          
          malaria_maps,
          
          
          ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1,.5,.1,.5), labels = c("A","B","","C"))
```

```{r}
ggsave("./figures/fig1.png", dpi = 800, bg = "white", height = 11, width = 9)
```

# INDICE RIQUEZA -----
```{r}
data_wi<-
   malaria_dist_total %>% 
  full_join(wi_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo','pop_landscan')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )

data_wi2<-
   malaria_dist_specie %>% 
  full_join(wi_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )



```


```{r}
data_bi <- bi_class(data_wi, y = wi_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")

data_bi2 <- bi_class(data_wi2, y = wi_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")
```


```{r}
map <- 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
 theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 1) +
  
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```


```{r}
map2<-
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi2 %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2013,2017,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  theme_void() +
  facet_grid(enfermedad~year)
```


```{r}
legend <- bi_legend(pal = "DkViolet",
                    dim = 3,
                    xlab = "malaria incidence",
                    ylab = "% Poverty",
                    size = 7)
```


```{r}
bimap_wi<-
  ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.42, .7, 0.20, 0.3) 
```


```{r}
bimap_wi_species<-
  ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map2, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.13, 0.15)
```


```{r}
#ggsave("./figures/fig8.png", dpi = 300, bg = "white", width = 9, height = 10)

```

## Moran bivariate

```{r}
library(spdep)
library(sfdep)

moran_test <-
  data_wi %>% 
  group_by(year) %>% 
  nest() %>% 
  mutate(
    nb = map(.x = data,
             .f = ~poly2nb(.x, queen = T)),
    
    lw = map(.x = nb,
             .f = ~nb2listw(.x, style = "W", zero.policy = T)),
    
    wt = map(.x = lw, .f = ~.x$weights),
    
    moranbi = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                   .f = ~moran_bv(x = .x$malaria_incidence, 
                                  y = .x$wi_estimate_prop, listw = .y, nsim = 999, scale = T)),
    
    morant = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                  .f = ~moran.test(x = .x$malaria_incidence, .y, alternative = "greater")),
    
    localmoran = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                      .f = ~localmoran(x = .x$malaria_incidence, .y, alternative = "greater")),
    
    # Use pmap to pass multiple arguments (data, nb, and lw)
    localmoran_bi = pmap(list(data, nb, wt),
                         ~ local_moran_bv(x = ..1$malaria_incidence, 
                                          y = ..1$wi_estimate_prop, 
                                          nb = ..2, 
                                          wt = ..3, nsim = 999)),
    
    
    
    lisa_classified = pmap(list(data, localmoran_bi, lw),
                          function(df, lisa, listw) {
                            # Estandarizar la variable X (malaria)
                            z_malaria <- scale(df$malaria_incidence)[,1]
                            
                            # Calcular el lag espacial de Y (edu) manualmente
                            lag_edu <- lag.listw(listw, df$wi_estimate_prop)
                            
                            # Estandarizar el lag
                            z_lag_edu <- scale(lag_edu)[,1]
                            
                            # Crear el dataframe con clasificación
                            df %>%
                              mutate(
                                Ib = lisa$Ib,
                                p_sim = lisa$p_sim,
                                z_malaria = z_malaria,
                                z_lag_edu = z_lag_edu,
                                
                                # Clasificar en cuadrantes
                                quadrant = case_when(
                                  z_malaria >= 0 & z_lag_edu >= 0 ~ "High-High",
                                  z_malaria < 0 & z_lag_edu < 0 ~ "Low-Low",
                                  z_malaria >= 0 & z_lag_edu < 0 ~ "High-Low",
                                  z_malaria < 0 & z_lag_edu >= 0 ~ "Low-High"
                                ),
                                
                                # Solo significativos
                                quadrant_sig = if_else(p_sim < 0.05, 
                                                       quadrant, 
                                                       "Not significant")
                              )
                          })
  )


moran_test$moranbi
```


```{r}
lisa_wi<-
  moran_test %>% 
  select(year,data,localmoran_bi,lisa_classified) %>% 
  unnest() %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
  select(year,ubigeo,malaria_incidence,wi_estimate_prop,Ib,p_sim,quadrant) %>% 
  filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)) %>% 
  mutate(
    sig = ifelse(p_sim<=0.05,'si','no')
  ) %>% 
  
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = quadrant, alpha = sig), col = "grey") +
  
  scale_alpha_manual(guide = "none", values = c('si' = 1,
                                                'no' = .2)) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low-Low" = "#1F78B4",
                               "High-Low"="#FDBF6F",
                               "High-High"="#E31A1C",
                               "Low-High"="#A6CEE3",
                               "Not significant" = "grey50"
                               
                               ), name = "LISA clusters"
                    ) +

  theme_void() +
  
  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 1) +
  
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm")
  )

```
```{r}
plot_grid(
  
  plot_grid(legend,map, nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(.6,1)),
  
  lisa_wi, nrow = 2, labels = c("A","B"))

ggsave("./figures/fig7.png", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 12)
```

# EDUCACION -----
```{r}
data_edu<-
   malaria_dist_total %>% 
  full_join(edu_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )


data_edu2<-
   malaria_dist_specie %>% 
  full_join(edu_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )
```


```{r}
data_bi <- bi_class(data_edu, y = edu_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")

data_bi2 <- bi_class(data_edu2, y = edu_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")
```


```{r}
map <- 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  labs(
    #title = "Malaria incidence distribution across education level"
  ) +
 theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 1) +
  
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


```


```{r}
map2<-
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi2 %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  theme_void() +
  facet_grid(enfermedad~year)
```


```{r}
legend <- bi_legend(pal = "DkViolet",
                    dim = 3,
                    xlab = "malaria incidence",
                    ylab = "% Element. education",
                    size = 7)
```


```{r}
bimap_edu<-
  ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.42, .7, 0.20, 0.3) 
```

```{r}
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map2, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.13, 0.15)
```

```{r}
#ggsave("./figures/fig9.png", dpi = 300, bg = "white", width = 9, height = 10)
```

## Moran bivariate

```{r}
library(spdep)
library(sfdep)

moran_test_edu <-
  data_edu %>% 
  group_by(year) %>% 
  nest() %>% 
  mutate(
    nb = map(.x = data,
             .f = ~poly2nb(.x, queen = T)),
    
    lw = map(.x = nb,
             .f = ~nb2listw(.x, style = "W", zero.policy = T)),
    
    wt = map(.x = lw, .f = ~.x$weights),
    
    moranbi = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                   .f = ~moran_bv(x = .x$malaria_incidence, 
                                  y = .x$edu_estimate_prop, listw = .y, nsim = 999, scale = T)),
    
    morant = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                  .f = ~moran.test(x = .x$malaria_incidence, .y, alternative = "greater")),
    
    localmoran = map2(.x = data, .y = lw,
                      .f = ~localmoran(x = .x$malaria_incidence, .y, alternative = "greater")),
    
    # Use pmap to pass multiple arguments (data, nb, and lw)
    localmoran_bi = pmap(list(data, nb, wt),
                         ~ local_moran_bv(x = ..1$malaria_incidence, 
                                          y = ..1$edu_estimate_prop, 
                                          nb = ..2, 
                                          wt = ..3, nsim = 999)),
    
    
    
    lisa_classified = pmap(list(data, localmoran_bi, lw),
                          function(df, lisa, listw) {
                            # Estandarizar la variable X (malaria)
                            z_malaria <- scale(df$malaria_incidence)[,1]
                            
                            # Calcular el lag espacial de Y (edu) manualmente
                            lag_edu <- lag.listw(listw, df$edu_estimate_prop)
                            
                            # Estandarizar el lag
                            z_lag_edu <- scale(lag_edu)[,1]
                            
                            # Crear el dataframe con clasificación
                            df %>%
                              mutate(
                                Ib = lisa$Ib,
                                p_sim = lisa$p_sim,
                                z_malaria = z_malaria,
                                z_lag_edu = z_lag_edu,
                                
                                # Clasificar en cuadrantes
                                quadrant = case_when(
                                  z_malaria >= 0 & z_lag_edu >= 0 ~ "High-High",
                                  z_malaria < 0 & z_lag_edu < 0 ~ "Low-Low",
                                  z_malaria >= 0 & z_lag_edu < 0 ~ "High-Low",
                                  z_malaria < 0 & z_lag_edu >= 0 ~ "Low-High"
                                ),
                                
                                # Solo significativos
                                quadrant_sig = if_else(p_sim < 0.05, 
                                                       quadrant, 
                                                       "Not significant")
                              )
                          })
  )
```


```{r}
lisa_edu<-
  moran_test_edu %>% 
  select(year,data,localmoran_bi,lisa_classified) %>% 
  unnest() %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
  select(year,ubigeo,malaria_incidence,edu_estimate_prop,Ib,p_sim,quadrant) %>% 
  filter(year %in% c(2010,2012,2014,2016,2018,2020)) %>% 
  mutate(
    sig = ifelse(p_sim<=0.05,'si','no')
  ) %>% 
  
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = quadrant, alpha = sig),col = "grey") +
  
  scale_alpha_manual(guide = "none", values = c('si' = 1,
                                                'no' = .2)) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low-Low" = "#1F78B4",
                               "High-Low"="#FDBF6F",
                               "High-High"="#E31A1C",
                               "Low-High"="#A6CEE3",
                               "Not significant" = "grey50"
                               
                               ), name = "LISA clusters"
                    ) +

  theme_void() +
  
  facet_wrap(~year, nrow = 1) +
  
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


```

```{r}
plot_grid(
  
  plot_grid(legend,map, nrow = 2, rel_heights = c(.6,1)),
  
  lisa_edu, nrow = 2, labels = c("A","B"))

ggsave("./figures/fig6.png", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 12)
```

```{r}

```
